ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "classifier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the classifier used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the experiment */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the experiment in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, running, failed) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for categorization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_classifier_id FOREIGN KEY ("classifier_id") REFERENCES classifiers ("classifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "num_features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., tabular, image, text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifiers" (
  "classifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classifier */,
  "classifier_name" TEXT /* Name of the classifier */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of classifier (e.g., Decision Tree, Random Forest) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the classifier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the classifier */,
  "library" TEXT /* Library used for the classifier */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the classifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifiers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Recall, Precision) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., accuracy, loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "metric_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric */,
  "predicted_score" REAL /* Predicted score for the metric */,
  "predicted_ranking" INTEGER /* Predicted ranking of the model based on the metric */,
  "original_score" REAL /* Original score for the metric */,
  "original_ranking" INTEGER /* Original ranking of the model based on the metric */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the metric score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the version */,
  "committed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who committed the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_committed_by FOREIGN KEY ("committed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the version */,
  "committed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who committed the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_committed_by FOREIGN KEY ("committed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
